name: @ts-fix/rules-naming-idioms-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's `naming-idioms` rule category (RULE-025): 14 SYN AST/token predicates (consistent-type-definitions, no-array-constructor, no-const-enum, no-empty-interface, no-inferrable-type-annotation, no-json-parse-stringify-clone, no-namespace, no-unnecessary-template-literal, no-var, pascal-case-types, prefer-array-methods, prefer-optional-chain, prefer-union-over-enum, triple-equals). Strangler-fig slice — consumes @ts-fix/rules-core-effect for the rule substrate (defineRule/runRule/Rule/RuleContext) and @ts-fix/contracts-effect for the Diagnostic/RuleMeta contracts. Plain-TS AST predicates wrapping the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (visitors are sync). Preserves the RULE-026 broken auto-fix quirk: triple-equals/no-var/no-const-enum/no-inferrable-type-annotation declare fixKind:"auto-fix" but emit no fix payload, and triple-equals allows the `== null` idiom.
